name: entity_relation_types_bridge_view_and_triggers
sql_up:
-- Create bridge VIEW to provide new generic name without breaking existing FKs
CREATE VIEW IF NOT EXISTS entity_relation_types AS
SELECT id, note_relation_type AS relation_type, created_at
FROM note_relation_types;

-- INSERT trigger to redirect writes to base table
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS trg_entity_relation_types_insert
INSTEAD OF INSERT ON entity_relation_types
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO note_relation_types (note_relation_type, created_at)
  VALUES (NEW.relation_type, COALESCE(NEW.created_at, datetime('now')));
END;

-- UPDATE trigger to redirect writes to base table
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS trg_entity_relation_types_update
INSTEAD OF UPDATE ON entity_relation_types
BEGIN
  UPDATE note_relation_types
  SET note_relation_type = NEW.relation_type
  WHERE id = OLD.id;
END;

-- DELETE trigger to redirect writes to base table
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS trg_entity_relation_types_delete
INSTEAD OF DELETE ON entity_relation_types
BEGIN
  DELETE FROM note_relation_types
  WHERE id = OLD.id;
END;
